title: Desktop gets the extra charts; marketplace is more honest
summary: The Extra Charts plugin (donut + horizontal bar) now ships in the desktop app too, and the plugins marketplace clearly flags first-party connectors that need explicit setup rather than implying they auto-install.
highlights: Donut + horizontal-bar charts now bundled in desktop (web/electron parity)
Slack/Unreal connectors marked 'Setup required' instead of implying they run
